MemberSignature.Value: public virtual Azure.Response<Azure.Storage.Files.DataLake.Models.ConcurrentAppendResult> Append (System.IO.Stream content, bool createIfNotExists = false, byte[] contentHash = default, IProgress<long> progressHandler = default, string fastPathSessionData = default, long? ifAppendPositionEqual = default, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class Azure.Response`1<class Azure.Storage.Files.DataLake.Models.ConcurrentAppendResult> Append(class System.IO.Stream content, bool createIfNotExists, unsigned int8[] contentHash, class System.IProgress`1<int64> progressHandler, string fastPathSessionData, valuetype System.Nullable`1<int64> ifAppendPositionEqual, valuetype System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken) cil managed

Public Overridable Function Append (content As Stream, Optional createIfNotExists As Boolean = false, Optional contentHash As Byte() = Nothing, Optional progressHandler As IProgress(Of Long) = Nothing, Optional fastPathSessionData As String = Nothing, Optional ifAppendPositionEqual As Nullable(Of Long) = Nothing, Optional cancellationToken As CancellationToken = Nothing) As Response(Of ConcurrentAppendResult)

override this.Append : System.IO.Stream * bool * byte[] * IProgress<int64> * string * Nullable<int64> * System.Threading.CancellationToken -> Azure.Response<Azure.Storage.Files.DataLake.Models.ConcurrentAppendResult>
MemberSignature.Usage: dataLakeAppendFileClient.Append (content, createIfNotExists, contentHash, progressHandler, fastPathSessionData, ifAppendPositionEqual, cancellationToken)

Docs.param: A containing the content to upload.
Specifies if the file should be created if it doesn't already exist.

This hash is used to verify the integrity of the request content during transport. When this header is specified, the storage service compares the hash of the content that has arrived with this header value. If the two hashes do not match, the operation will fail with error code 400 (Bad Request). Note that this MD5 hash is not stored with the file. This header is associated with the request content, and not with the stored content of the file itself.
Optional to provide progress updates about data transfers.
Fast path session data.
IfAppendPositionEqual ensures that the AppendBlock operation succeeds only if the append position is equal to a value.
Optional to propagate notifications that the operation should be cancelled.
Docs.summary:
The operation uploads data to be appended to a file. Data can only be appended to a file.
For more information, see
Update Path.
Docs.returns: A describing the state of the updated file.
Docs.remarks: A will be thrown if a failure occurs.

MemberSignature.Value: public virtual System.Threading.Tasks.Task<Azure.Response<Azure.Storage.Files.DataLake.Models.ConcurrentAppendResult>> AppendAsync (System.IO.Stream content, bool createIfNotExists = false, byte[] contentHash = default, IProgress<long> progressHandler = default, string fastPathSessionData = default, long? ifAppendPositionEqual = default, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class System.Threading.Tasks.Task`1<class Azure.Response`1<class Azure.Storage.Files.DataLake.Models.ConcurrentAppendResult>> AppendAsync(class System.IO.Stream content, bool createIfNotExists, unsigned int8[] contentHash, class System.IProgress`1<int64> progressHandler, string fastPathSessionData, valuetype System.Nullable`1<int64> ifAppendPositionEqual, valuetype System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken) cil managed

Public Overridable Function AppendAsync (content As Stream, Optional createIfNotExists As Boolean = false, Optional contentHash As Byte() = Nothing, Optional progressHandler As IProgress(Of Long) = Nothing, Optional fastPathSessionData As String = Nothing, Optional ifAppendPositionEqual As Nullable(Of Long) = Nothing, Optional cancellationToken As CancellationToken = Nothing) As Task(Of Response(Of ConcurrentAppendResult))

override this.AppendAsync : System.IO.Stream * bool * byte[] * IProgress<int64> * string * Nullable<int64> * System.Threading.CancellationToken -> System.Threading.Tasks.Task<Azure.Response<Azure.Storage.Files.DataLake.Models.ConcurrentAppendResult>>
MemberSignature.Usage: dataLakeAppendFileClient.AppendAsync (content, createIfNotExists, contentHash, progressHandler, fastPathSessionData, ifAppendPositionEqual, cancellationToken)

Docs.param: A containing the content to upload.
Specifies if the file should be created if it doesn't already exist.

This hash is used to verify the integrity of the request content during transport. When this header is specified, the storage service compares the hash of the content that has arrived with this header value. If the two hashes do not match, the operation will fail with error code 400 (Bad Request). Note that this MD5 hash is not stored with the file. This header is associated with the request content, and not with the stored content of the file itself.
Optional to provide progress updates about data transfers.
Fast path session data.
IfAppendPositionEqual ensures that the AppendBlock operation succeeds only if the append position is equal to a value.
Optional to propagate notifications that the operation should be cancelled.
Docs.summary:
The operation uploads data to be appended to a file. Data can only be appended to a file.
For more information, see
Update Path.
Docs.returns: A describing the state of the updated file.
Docs.remarks: A will be thrown if a failure occurs.

MemberSignature.Value: public virtual Azure.Response<Azure.Storage.Files.DataLake.Models.PathInfo> Create (Azure.Storage.Files.DataLake.Models.DataLakePathCreateOptions options = default, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

Docs.param: Optional parameters.
Optional to propagate notifications that the operation should be cancelled.
Docs.summary:
The operation creates a file. If the file already exists, it will be overwritten. If you don't intent to overwrite an existing file, consider using the API.
For more information, see https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/rest/api/storageservices/datalakestoragegen2/path/create.
Docs.returns: A describing the newly created file.
Docs.remarks: A will be thrown if a failure occurs.
